zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip De Aylesbury於大約1276年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利時，他的父親Walter Aylesbury13歲，母親Cecilia Somery21歲。他於1309年與Margaret Keynes在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1349年7月14日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip De Aylesbury于大约1276年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利时，他的父亲Walter Aylesbury13岁，母亲Cecilia Somery21岁。他于1309年与Margaret Keynes在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1349年7月14日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aylesbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Aylesbury (Bucks) or possibly Aylesbeare (Devon).

variants.name: Elsbury
meanings: English: habitational name from Aylesbury (Buckinghamshire), from an Old English personal name Ægel (genitive Ægeles, Ægles) + burg ‘fortified place’ (dative byrig).

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip De Aylesbury was born about 1276, in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Walter Aylesbury, was 13 and his mother, Cecilia Somery, was 21. He married Margaret Keynes in 1309, in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 14 July 1349, in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip De Aylesbury est né environ 1276, à Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter Aylesbury, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Somery, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Keynes en 1309, à Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 juillet 1349, à Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans.

Lui sposato Margaret Keynes nel 1309, nel Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Philip De Aylesburyが約1276年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリーで生まれた時，父Walter Aylesburyは13歳，母Cecilia Someryは21歳であった。1309年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアミルトン ケインスでMargaret Keynesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1349年7月14日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアミルトン ケインスで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip De Aylesbury(이)가 대략 1276년 영국 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Aylesbury(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia Somery(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1309년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 미턴 케인스에서 Margaret Keynes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1349년 7월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 미턴 케인스에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret Keynes em 1309, em Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip De Aylesbury родился около 1276 г. в местности аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Aylesbury было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Somery, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Keynes в 1309 г. в местности милтон кинесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 14 июля 1349 г. в местности милтон кинесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет.
